GeneDef.label: xenogenes editor
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that can freely edit the owner's xenogenes.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Genetic material is used to <color=#8a8ae6>edit xenogenes</color>.
Adding <color=#8a8ae6>new xenogenes</color> consumes genetic material depending on the <color=#8a8ae6>complexity</color> of the genes.
<color=#8a8ae6>Archite</color> genes always consume all genetic material.
The amount of genetic material can be seen on the gene label.
If <color=#8a8ae6>genes regrowing</color> then genetic material stops accumulating, instead the duration of genes regrowing <color=#8a8ae6>decreases</color>.
